# PERF-216 positive: struct allocation inside hot loop
lang: go
file: PERF-216-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type TreeNode struct {
	A int
	B int
	C int
}

func Build(items []int) []*TreeNode {
	out := make([]*TreeNode, 0, len(items))
	for i := range items {
		node := &TreeNode{A: i, B: i + 1, C: i + 2}
		out = append(out, node)
	}
	return out
}
